description_long: This hotel complex consists of several interconnected, multi-story buildings arranged within a rectangular walled perimeter. The structures feature flat roofs, numerous rectangular windows, and a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and muted colors. The central building appears to be the main entrance, accessible via a wide driveway and flanked by landscaped areas and smaller outbuildings. The grounds include paved walkways, parking areas, and what appears to be a pool or recreational area. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with some green landscaping and sparse trees. The overall layout suggests a contemporary urban hotel designed for both vehicle and pedestrian access.
description: A modern, multi-building hotel complex with flat roofs, light-colored facades, and a central entrance within a walled urban lot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the hotel from the side, highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and several buildings with flat roofs and multiple windows.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a head-on perspective of the main entrance, with the driveway leading directly to the central building and visible parking areas to the right.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the hotel complex, revealing additional outbuildings, utility areas, and a pool or recreational space.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side of the hotel, with more of the landscaped grounds, secondary entrances, and service areas visible.
